world.name: World Overview (全球底图)
world.description: Global basemap containing landmasses, country boundaries and oceans for zoom 0-5. Perfect offline canvas.

china.name: China Overview (中国概况底图)
china.description: Full country overview containing administrative lines, national expressways and major capital nodes for zoom 6-8.

dandong_overview.name: Dandong Overview (丹东概况图)
dandong_overview.description: Regional overview containing roads, transit lines, and county-level boundaries for Dandong region (Zoom 9-11) in Raster PNG format.

dandong_detail.name: Dandong Detailed (丹东全域详图)
dandong_detail.description: High-resolution detailed tileset (Zoom 12-16) covering Zhenxing, Yuanbao, Zhenan, Donggang, Fengcheng, and Kuandian in Raster PNG format.
